function.message: I couldn’t safely complete this inbox request because only one side of the comparison is canonically present. The house-fix-log candidate exists as project `40_projects/2026_05_03_repair_ledger/README.MD` (start date implied by folder prefix `2026_05_03`), but there is no canonical project record for a sailboat refit notebook—only mentions in `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md` describing it as an unscheduled fantasy idea. Without a canonical second project/start date, I can’t determine which started earlier or delete an “earliest project” without guessing. Inbox item was left untouched.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, read nested AGENTS files before entering folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, and avoided destructive mutation because deletion target was not uniquely supported by canonical evidence.
function.outcome_justification: Per workflow/rules, deletion requires exact canonical target support and no guessing. Evidence supports only Repair Ledger as a project; no canonical sailboat refit project/start date exists in visible files, so the request is ambiguous/incomplete.
